forecasts.detailed: Rain showers after 11am. Mostly cloudy. High near 73, with temperatures falling to around 66 in the afternoon. South wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
